title: Realistic Clocks
description: A Resource Pack that makes clocks work like real life clocks.
body:
# Realistic Clocks

This pack changes clocks into a more readable realistic format.
Instead of showing the position of the sun and moon this pack gives the clock an hour and a minute hands.

The pack is very lightweight only modifying the clock model in a way that fits the vanilla aesthetic. Using it with other packs should not cause any issues.

![A clock in an item frame in front of a window with a sunset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21bbf5d68f60fb5524050bceede179a73db33699.png)
